risk.drought: Drought has struck — crops are wilting under the scorching sun.
risk.flood: Heavy flooding has damaged fields and roads.
risk.hailstorm: A hailstorm has battered your standing crop.
risk.unseasonal_rain: Unseasonal rain has affected harvest quality.
risk.family_emergency: A family emergency requires immediate cash.
risk.festival_expense: Festival season — community obligations require spending.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Anaj-Arth
onboarding.subtitle: Learn to make better post-harvest decisions

narrator.welcome: You arrive at the mandi with your harvest. The arhatiya approaches...

arhatiya.opening: The quality isn't great this year. I can offer ₹{{price}} per quintal — take it or leave it.
arhatiya.market_down: The market is down everywhere. Even this price is generous.
arhatiya.delay_threat: If you don't sell today, you'll wait weeks for another buyer.
arhatiya.concede: Alright, I can stretch to ₹{{price}}. Final offer.

farmer.quote_msp: The MSP is ₹{{msp}} — I know my rights
farmer.counter: That's too low, I need more
farmer.show_enam: I've checked eNAM — prices are higher online
farmer.use_enwr: I'll store it in a warehouse instead
farmer.push_more: I think I deserve a bit more

end.low: You sold at a low price. The arhatiya got the better deal.
end.mid: You got an average price. Not bad, but room to improve.
end.fair: Good negotiation! You secured a fair price.
end.good: Excellent! You pushed hard and got above-market price.
end.walkaway: You walked away. You can try another buyer or store your grain.
end.enwr: Smart choice! You'll store your grain and sell when prices are better.

credit.kcc: Kisan Credit Card — Government-subsidized loan at 7% annual interest
credit.moneylender: Moneylender — Instant cash but 36% annual interest
credit.nbfc: NBFC — Moderate rates at 18% annual interest

recommend.high_risk: Given the weather and crop risk, insurance is strongly recommended.
recommend.low_risk: Risk is low this season, but insurance provides peace of mind.
